title: Header Fields, Representations, Negotiation, Validators, and Caching · Spiral Systems Review
summary: A delayed operations handoff reconstructs header fields, representations, negotiation, validators, and caching from bounded request and server evidence, challenges one retained misconception, and revises the representation selection and cache contract. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for representation selection and cache contract after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Handle case-insensitive field names, repeated values, list syntax, hop-by-hop fields, size limits, and canonical map behavior without naïve splitting.
Validate request Content-Type and parameters, select an acceptable response representation, and return 415 or 406 with a documented default.
Set Content-Type, Content-Length strategy, Location, validators, Cache-Control, Vary, security fields, and trailers before committing response headers.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Go server Separate evidence from confidence · Review Cache Privacy Vary
steps.instruction:
review case — A review team handles case 1194 in a canary service revision draining long-lived streams. Build deterministic Go evidence to negotiate a representation and keep validator and privacy decisions independent; then change the tenant and show deny-by-default before repository access. Browser code models decisions only. Listener, TLS, database, proxy, race, load, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Design shared and private caching, freshness, revalidation, no-store, stale behavior, invalidation, and Vary without exposing user-specific data.

Inspect the Cache Privacy Vary trace for this review case. Which record connects a precondition, observed state change, and boundary result?

Evidence target: Go server Separate evidence from confidence · Review Cache Privacy Vary.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for design shared and private caching, freshness, revalidation, no-store, stale behavior, invalidation, and vary without exposing user-specific data. For Go server Separate evidence from confidence · Review Cache Privacy Vary, keep Cache Privacy Vary connected to executable HTTP client decision evidence.
